positive: A whimsical, stylized depiction of a constellation journey. The main subject is a group of stylized, hand-drawn celestial animals (a friendly fox, a soaring owl, a graceful deer) navigating through a stylized galaxy nebula. The composition is central and balanced, featuring strong silhouettes against a deep indigo and sapphire gradient background. Use clean, bold linework and flat, pop-art inspired color blocking for the celestial bodies and animals. Emphasize negative space and high contrast. The style should be reminiscent of modern mid-century illustration and modern tattoo art, suitable for screen printing. Perfect composition for a round-neck t-shirt print. Minimalist details, bold outlines, vibrant cosmic blues, purples, and accents of gold leaf texture for starlight. Vector art aesthetic.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, noisy, low quality, bad anatomy, bad hands, extra limbs, messy, realistic photo, photorealism, out of frame, dirty
